template: SELECT actor_id, first_name, last_name FROM actor WHERE first_name = "{actor_first_name}"
description: Find an actor by first name.

template: SELECT f.title, i.inventory_id, i.store_id FROM film f INNER JOIN inventory i ON f.film_id = i.film_id WHERE f.title = "{film_title}" AND i.store_id = {store_store_id}
description: Check if a movie title is available in a specific store.

template: SELECT AVG(f.length) AS average_length FROM film f INNER JOIN film_category fc ON f.film_id = fc.film_id INNER JOIN category c ON fc.category_id = c.category_id WHERE c.name = "{category_name}"
description: Calculate the average movie length for a given category.

template: SELECT rental_id FROM rental WHERE inventory_id = {rental_inventory_id} AND customer_id = {customer_customer_id} AND return_date IS NULL INTO @rentID
description: Find active rental ID for a specific inventory item and customer.

template: SELECT f.title, COUNT(i.inventory_id) AS copies FROM film f INNER JOIN inventory i ON f.film_id = i.film_id WHERE i.store_id = {store_store_id} GROUP BY f.film_id
description: Count the number of copies of each film in a given store.

template: SELECT s.first_name, s.last_name FROM staff s INNER JOIN store st ON s.staff_id = st.manager_staff_id WHERE st.store_id = {store_store_id}
description: Get the first and last name of a store manager by store ID.

template: SELECT a.first_name, a.last_name FROM actor a INNER JOIN film_actor fa ON a.actor_id = fa.actor_id INNER JOIN film f ON fa.film_id = f.film_id WHERE f.title = "{film_title}"
description: Get the actors of a film by title.

template: SELECT c.customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name FROM customer c INNER JOIN rental r ON c.customer_id = r.customer_id INNER JOIN inventory i ON r.inventory_id = i.inventory_id INNER JOIN film_category fc ON i.film_id = fc.film_id INNER JOIN category cat ON fc.category_id = cat.category_id WHERE cat.name = "{category_name}" GROUP BY c.customer_id HAVING COUNT(r.rental_id) BETWEEN {rand_small_pos_number} AND {rand_small_pos_number}
description: Find customers who rented between X and Y movies in a given category.

template: SELECT phone, district FROM address WHERE district IN ("{address_district}", "{address_district}", "{address_district}")
description: Get phone and district for addresses in specified districts.

template: SELECT * FROM payment WHERE payment_date BETWEEN "{payment_payment_date}" AND "{payment_payment_date}"
description: Get all payments made between two dates.

template: SELECT title, description, release_year FROM film WHERE description LIKE "{rand_string}"
description: Find films where description begins with a given string.
Search films using a flexible set of filter conditions.
